name: ACCURAY INC
summary: Accuray Incorporated is a radiation therapy company that develops, manufactures, sells, and supports radiation treatment solutions. Its primary products are the CyberKnife robotic radiosurgery system and the TomoTherapy platform, including the next-generation Radixact System. These systems deliver SRS, SBRT, IMRT, IGRT, and adaptive radiation therapy. Accuray also offers treatment planning software, imaging solutions, and post-contract customer support services to oncology centers worldwide.

products.name: CyberKnife
products.description: Robotic radiosurgery system for treating tumors throughout the body including brain, spine, and neurologic/endocrine disorders.

products.name: TomoTherapy
products.description: Radiation therapy platform supporting IMRT, IGRT, and adaptive radiation therapy treatments.

products.name: Radixact System
products.description: Next-generation TomoTherapy platform with advanced treatment delivery capabilities.

products.name: Accuray Helix
products.description: CT-guided helical radiotherapy system combining affordability with automation to expand patient access to radiation medicine.

products.name: ClearRT
products.description: Imaging solution designed to produce diagnostic-like quality CT images quickly and cost-effectively.

products.name: VoLO
products.description: Treatment planning software that reduces time to create high-quality plans and deliver patient treatments.

products.name: AutoSegmentation
products.description: Automated tool to identify interfraction changes for clinically beneficial re-planning and dose adaptation.

products.name: PreciseRTX
products.description: Software that accelerates and automates re-planning for re-treatment of previously irradiated areas.

products.name: Accuray Precision
products.description: Treatment planning system for Accuray radiation therapy platforms.

products.name: iDMS
products.description: Data management solution supporting radiation therapy workflow and patient data management.

products.name: Post-contract customer support
products.description: Warranty and post-warranty services, installation, training, and professional services for Accuray systems.

partnerships.description: Integration of TomoTherapy, Radixact, and CyberKnife treatment planning support into RayStation TPS and RayCare OIS; agreement signed fiscal 2016.
Agreement to enhance image quality of TomoTherapy System through enhanced image reconstruction software; signed fiscal 2017.

partnerships.partner_name: CNNC High Energy Equipment (Tianjin) Co., Ltd. (CIRC Subsidiary)
partnerships.description: Joint venture CNNC Accuray (TianJin) Medical Technology Co. Ltd. formed in fiscal 2019 to manufacture and sell radiation oncology products in China.
